name: Set-theoretic
central_question: Can mathematics be built from sets and membership?
mathematical_strength: provides a broad common language for modern mathematics
limitation_note: membership language may not reflect everyday mathematical practice
responsible_interpretation: distinguish foundational coding from mathematical meaning and use
audit_question: What does this foundation make clear, and what does it leave out?

name: Logical
central_question: Can mathematics be grounded in logic?
limitation_note: logic may not capture all mathematical practice or ontology
responsible_interpretation: distinguish logical derivation from interpretation and application
audit_question: What does this foundation make clear, and what does it leave out?

name: Formalist
central_question: Can mathematics be secured through formal systems?
mathematical_strength: makes axioms, syntax, and proof rules explicit
limitation_note: syntax can be mistaken for meaning
responsible_interpretation: distinguish formal manipulation from mathematical explanation
audit_question: What does this foundation make clear, and what does it leave out?

name: Intuitionistic
limitation_note: classical results may not transfer directly
responsible_interpretation: state whether existence is constructive or non-constructive
audit_question: What does this foundation make clear, and what does it leave out?

name: Structural
central_question: What relations and operations define mathematical objects?
limitation_note: abstraction can detach from examples and access
responsible_interpretation: connect structures to examples, maps, and assumptions
audit_question: What does this foundation make clear, and what does it leave out?

name: Computational
central_question: What can be computed, checked, simulated, or verified?
mathematical_strength: makes procedures executable and proofs checkable
limitation_note: computation can be mistaken for proof, interpretation, or wisdom
responsible_interpretation: distinguish algorithm, model, proof, evidence, and consequence
audit_question: What does this foundation make clear, and what does it leave out?
